# setBufferFrameSize(_:)

**Instance Method**

Set the bufferFrameSize property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setBufferFrameSize(_ size: Int) throws
```

## Parameters

- **size**: An Int whose value indicates the number of frames in the IO buffers.
title: setBufferFrameSize(_:)
